name: Direct message our team
about: Contact the maintainers directly via email with questions or concerns

---

**Before emailing the team**, please consider: - Have you checked existing [Issues](https://github.com/ESIPFed/esipDMP/issues) and [Discussions](https://github.com/ESIPFed/esipDMP/discussions)? - Is this a bug report or feature request? Consider using the appropriate issue template instead.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Email Template

When contacting us at **esip-dmp-admins\@esipfed.org**, please include the following information:

**Subject Line:** \[Brief description of your inquiry\]

**Your Message:**

### What is your question or concern?

<!-- Describe your question, concern, or feedback -->

### Context (if applicable)

```{=html}
<!-- Provide any relevant context, such as:
- What you were trying to accomplish
- Steps you've taken so far
- Links to relevant documentation or issues
- Your environment (R/Python version, package version, etc.)
-->
```

### Additional Information

<!-- Any other details that might be helpful -->

------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Privacy Note:** When emailing directly, your message will only be visible to the maintainers, not the public.

If you'd prefer public discussion where the community can help, consider opening a [Discussion](https://github.com/ESIPFed/esipDMP/discussions) instead.
